description: Prompt-time skill library for adapter generation.

skills.name: HTTP Endpoint Extractor
skills.purpose: Extract candidate endpoints, HTTP method, auth style, and payload fields from input docs.
skills.instruction: Prefer canonical API endpoint, infer method from examples, and keep uncertain fields in warnings.

skills.name: JSONPath Response Mapper
skills.purpose: Map nested upstream response fields into unified output using JSONPath.
skills.instruction: Use stable JSONPath paths and avoid lossy mappings.

skills.name: Web Search
skills.purpose: Use DuckDuckGo to search web pages and return title, link, and snippet for candidate sources.
skills.instruction: Use this first to discover likely official docs and API references.

skills.name: Web Fetch
skills.purpose: Fetch target URL content and extract readable markdown/text body.
skills.instruction: After web_search, fetch top candidate pages and extract endpoint/auth/params for adapter generation.
